query:
INSERT INTO quiz_questions (lessonId, question, questionType, options, correctAnswer, questionOrder) VALUES
-- Lesson 4: Lifestyle Evangelism (360044)
(360044, 'Lifestyle evangelism emphasizes:', 'multiple_choice', '["Verbal proclamation only","Living authentically as a witness","Avoiding non-Christians","Religious performance"]', 'Living authentically as a witness', 1),
(360044, 'Jesus said believers are the:', 'multiple_choice', '["Judges of the world","Salt and light of the world","Rulers of society","Critics of culture"]', 'Salt and light of the world', 2),
(360044, 'Integrity in lifestyle evangelism means:', 'multiple_choice', '["Perfection","Consistency between words and actions","Hiding failures","Appearing religious"]', 'Consistency between words and actions', 3),
(360044, 'Building relationships with non-believers requires:', 'multiple_choice', '["Isolation from them","Genuine interest and care","Compromise of convictions","Hidden agendas"]', 'Genuine interest and care', 4),
(360044, 'The workplace provides opportunities for:', 'multiple_choice', '["Preaching during work hours","Demonstrating Christ through excellence and character","Avoiding colleagues","Religious debates"]', 'Demonstrating Christ through excellence and character', 5),
(360044, 'Hospitality as evangelism involves:', 'multiple_choice', '["Expensive entertaining","Opening your home and life to others","Formal events only","Church functions only"]', 'Opening your home and life to others', 6),
(360044, 'When facing moral dilemmas at work, Christians should:', 'multiple_choice', '["Compromise for success","Stand firm with grace and wisdom","Quit immediately","Ignore the situation"]', 'Stand firm with grace and wisdom', 7),
(360044, 'Lifestyle evangelism is effective because:', 'multiple_choice', '["It avoids confrontation","People see faith lived out authentically","It requires no effort","It replaces verbal witness"]', 'People see faith lived out authentically', 8),
(360044, 'The balance in lifestyle evangelism includes:', 'multiple_choice', '["Living only, never speaking","Both living and speaking the gospel","Speaking only, never living","Neither living nor speaking"]', 'Both living and speaking the gospel', 9),
(360044, 'Serving others as evangelism reflects:', 'multiple_choice', '["Manipulation tactics","Christ''s example of servant leadership","Weakness","Obligation"]', 'Christ''s example of servant leadership', 10),
(360044, 'Explain how lifestyle evangelism complements verbal proclamation of the gospel.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'Lifestyle evangelism creates credibility and opens doors for verbal witness. When people see authentic Christian living, they become curious about the source of that life, creating opportunities to share the gospel message.', 11),
-- Lesson 5: Overcoming Fear and Objections (360045)
(360045, 'The most common barrier to evangelism is:', 'multiple_choice', '["Lack of knowledge","Fear of rejection","Lack of time","Theological disagreement"]', 'Fear of rejection', 1),
(360045, 'According to 2 Timothy 1:7, God has given us:', 'multiple_choice', '["A spirit of fear","A spirit of power, love, and self-discipline","A spirit of timidity","A spirit of caution"]', 'A spirit of power, love, and self-discipline', 2),
(360045, 'When facing objections, Christians should:', 'multiple_choice', '["Argue aggressively","Listen, understand, and respond with gentleness","Avoid the conversation","Condemn the questioner"]', 'Listen, understand, and respond with gentleness', 3),
(360045, 'The fear of not knowing enough can be overcome by:', 'multiple_choice', '["Waiting until perfect","Sharing what you do know and continuing to learn","Avoiding evangelism","Memorizing all answers"]', 'Sharing what you do know and continuing to learn', 4),
(360045, 'Common intellectual objections include:', 'multiple_choice', '["Questions about suffering, science, and exclusivity","Requests for money","Political disagreements","Personal attacks"]', 'Questions about suffering, science, and exclusivity', 5),
(360045, 'When you don''t know an answer, you should:', 'multiple_choice', '["Make something up","Honestly admit it and offer to find out","Change the subject","End the conversation"]', 'Honestly admit it and offer to find out', 6),
(360045, 'Prayer helps overcome fear by:', 'multiple_choice', '["Avoiding people","Connecting us to God''s power and peace","Delaying evangelism","Replacing action"]', 'Connecting us to God''s power and peace', 7),
(360045, 'Rejection in evangelism should be viewed as:', 'multiple_choice', '["Personal failure","Part of the process, not rejection of you","Reason to quit","Sign of wrong approach"]', 'Part of the process, not rejection of you', 8),
(360045, 'Preparing for objections involves:', 'multiple_choice', '["Memorizing debate tactics","Studying common questions and biblical responses","Avoiding difficult people","Ignoring challenges"]', 'Studying common questions and biblical responses', 9),
(360045, 'The ultimate success in evangelism is:', 'multiple_choice', '["Conversion numbers","Faithful obedience to share","Winning arguments","Popularity"]', 'Faithful obedience to share', 10),
(360045, 'Describe strategies for overcoming fear in personal evangelism and how to handle common objections.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'Strategies include prayer for boldness, remembering God''s presence, focusing on obedience rather than results, preparing responses to common objections, and viewing rejection as part of the process rather than personal failure.', 11),
-- Lesson 6: Discipleship Foundations (750019)
(750019, 'The Greek word mathetes means:', 'multiple_choice', '["Teacher","Learner or follower","Leader","Prophet"]', 'Learner or follower', 1),
(750019, 'Jesus'' discipleship method primarily involved:', 'multiple_choice', '["Classroom lectures","Life-on-life relationship and modeling","Written curriculum","Distance learning"]', 'Life-on-life relationship and modeling', 2),
(750019, 'The Great Commission commands us to:', 'multiple_choice', '["Make converts","Make disciples","Build buildings","Start programs"]', 'Make disciples', 3),
(750019, 'Effective discipleship requires:', 'multiple_choice', '["Quick results","Time, relationship, and intentionality","Formal education only","Large groups"]', 'Time, relationship, and intentionality', 4),
(750019, 'Jesus selected his disciples based on:', 'multiple_choice', '["Their education","Their availability and teachability","Their wealth","Their social status"]', 'Their availability and teachability', 5),
(750019, 'The goal of discipleship is:', 'multiple_choice', '["Knowledge accumulation","Christlike maturity and reproduction","Church attendance","Religious activity"]', 'Christlike maturity and reproduction', 6),
(750019, 'Discipleship involves teaching obedience to:', 'multiple_choice', '["Church traditions","All that Christ commanded","Human opinions","Cultural norms"]', 'All that Christ commanded', 7),
(750019, 'The disciple-maker''s role is to:', 'multiple_choice', '["Control others","Guide and equip believers to maturity","Do everything for them","Create dependency"]', 'Guide and equip believers to maturity', 8),
(750019, 'A philosophy of discipleship should include:', 'multiple_choice', '["Random activities","Clear goals, methods, and outcomes","Rigid programs only","No structure"]', 'Clear goals, methods, and outcomes', 9),
(750019, 'Luke 6:40 teaches that a disciple will become:', 'multiple_choice', '["Superior to the teacher","Like their teacher when fully trained","Independent of teaching","Unchanged"]', 'Like their teacher when fully trained', 10),
(750019, 'Explain the essential components of Jesus'' discipleship model and how they apply to modern ministry.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'Jesus'' model included selection, association, instruction, demonstration, delegation, supervision, and reproduction. Modern application involves intentional relationships, teaching, modeling, giving responsibility, and multiplying disciple-makers.', 11);
command:
